properties.description: Lands a copy of the CRM lead/opportunity funnel data (owned by the legacy Informatica PowerCenter workflow wf_CRM_Lead_Opportunity_Extract) into ADLS so it can be joined in the Silver/Gold Delta layer for marketing attribution and funnel analytics, without disrupting existing PowerCenter-fed sales-reporting consumers during the phased migration (see informatica/wf_CRM_Lead_Opportunity_Extract_summary.md).

source.oracleReaderQuery: SELECT * FROM CRM.LEAD_OPPORTUNITY WHERE LAST_UPDATED_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)
